chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 257 of 2013 SCRAs 202, 204 to 228, 258 & 259 of 2013 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.10.2025 Mr. Amir Raza Naqvi, advocate for the respondent. These reference applications are pending since 2013 without any progress. Even today, Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate seeks time to prepare his brief. The matters have clogged the docket for 12 years and there is no apparent reason to sustain the same. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
